text: What single output representation should orus --version and orus doctor use in M0?
why_it_matters: Discovery requires structured, golden-testable output but does not choose rendering; the answer fixes the smallest public CLI contract without adding future commands.
unlocks: CLI-FR-001, CLI-FR-004, M0-VERSION-RESULT-v1, M0-DOCTOR-RESULT-v1, and all CLI goldens.

options.label: JSON by default
options.pros: One exact typed surface with robust nested doctor results.
options.cons: Less conventional for a human-only version invocation.

options.label: Key-value lines
options.pros: Familiar and easy to inspect or parse for version facts.
options.cons: Awkward typing, escaping, and nesting for doctor results.

options.label: Human text plus format flag
options.pros: Optimizes both interactive and machine consumers.
options.cons: Adds an unrequested M0 option and doubles the golden-test surface.

default: Emit one bounded JSON document per invocation with no additional format flag and record that choice in a domain ADR before Ready.

answer.text: Option 1: emit one bounded JSON document per invocation for both orus --version and orus doctor, with no additional M0 format flag or parallel human-text contract.
